channel.title: BitDevsDLA
channel.description: BitDevsDLA is a community in Douala, for those interested in discussing and participating in the research and development of Bitcoin and related protocols and software.

item.title: Socratic Seminar #0
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
Agenda

11:00am Welcoming Address

11:10am Hello World!

11:20am Bitcoin as a Development Protocol

Location

The event is hosted at Douala:

Map

Reminders

  • Bitcoin only event
  • No photos, videos, audio recording
  • Chatham House Rule
  • Leave the meeting space as clean as you found it
  • Suggest topics for the next Socratic Seminar! Where to find topics?
  • Questions are encouraged, including basic ones

Topics

  • N/A
